channel.title: Japanese Writing Practice - Zen Column Updates
channel.description: Calm release notes for the Japanese article typing and writing guidance app.

item.title: Zen Column: Optional Token Guidance
item.description: A new Guidance control on the practice screen lets you reveal word boundaries, grammar colors, or review highlights, with a legend for the colors and a one-tap return to the calm Focus Only view.

item.title: Zen Column: Application Updates Feed
item.description: The practice surface now includes a quiet RSS subscription link and a project update feed for important Zen-mode changes.
